prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: foreground parallax overlay for temple courtyard scenes
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style reference only
Primary request: one complete L-shaped paper-cut foreground element combining a dark blue-gray traditional temple eave across the upper right and a small ochre bamboo branch at the lower left
Style/medium: handcrafted layered rice-paper collage matching Image 1
Composition/framing: complete separated silhouette with generous padding; designed to frame rather than cover the center
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat uniform solid #00ff00 chroma-key, no texture, shadow, gradient, floor or reflection
Constraints: no people, no text, no logo, no watermark; do not use #00ff00 in the overlay
